text:
wen         2011-09-27 06:35:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/dynare          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    math/dynare/files    patch-journal.cweb 
                         patch-parser-exception.h 
  Log:
  Dynare is a software platform for handling a wide class of
  economic models, in particular dynamic stochastic general
  equilibrium (DSGE) and overlapping generations (OLG) models.
  
  WWW: http://www.dynare.org
  
  PR:             ports/160153
  Submitted by:   Fernando <fernando.apesteguia@gmail.com>
